productDisplayName: Timberland Unisex Max 2 Shine Neutr Shoe Accessories
description: timberland boot Shine is the ultimate in shoe care convenience. It contains a unique formulation, which protects, renovates, shines and helps repel moisture and stains, all in one easy application. For use on smooth and polishable leathers only, not for use on suede or nubuck. Boot Shine also works on belts, leather bags and purses. Method of application Remove surface dirt with our Rubber Sole Brush or our Suede Brush Test on a small area prior to full use Gently wipe product over entire shoe Do not buff
